narrative:
Huntington Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 925 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
